title: Countries by income group in 1990 — equal-area tiles
subtitle: One tile per country; this is not a geographic map
visdescription: An equal-area country tile grid first shows an alphabetical overview, then groups countries by their 1990 income classification, and finally adds country codes.

scenes.text: This equal-area overview shows each country according to its income classification in 1990; location on the grid is not geographic.
The same countries are now regrouped by income class while every country keeps equal visual area.
Country codes are added to the grouped tiles; color continues to show the 1990 income class.

limitations.geometry: The bundled CSV contains country codes and classifications but no country geometry. The renderer therefore uses an equal-area tile grid, not a geographic map.
limitations.time: The preserved chapter narrative describes 1990. Although the shared dataset also contains a current classification, this renderer intentionally shows the 1990 field in every scene.
